sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Patrick Bowe Sells 900 Shares of Andersons Inc (AN)
feed.summary: Patrick Bowe, a Director at Andersons Inc (ANDE), sold 900 shares of the company on April 29, 2026. This transaction follows a pattern of insider selling at Andersons Inc, with 14 insider sells and no buys recorded over the past year. The stock is currently trading at $78.06, with a high price-earnings ratio and a price-to-GF-Value ratio indicating it is significantly overvalued based on GuruFocus's intrinsic value estimate.

feed.title: Agnico-Eagle Mines Annual Gold Production and Cost Guidance Reiterated >AEM.T
feed.summary: This article from Agnico-Eagle Mines reiterates their annual gold production and cost guidance. Further details are not available in the provided content.

feed.title: Results: Generac Holdings Inc. Exceeded Expectations And The Consensus Has Updated Its Estimates
feed.summary: Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE:GNRC) shareholders saw a 19% stock price increase after the company's latest quarterly results. Revenues were in line with expectations at US$1.1 billion, but statutory earnings per share significantly exceeded estimates at US$1.24, a 26% beat. Following these results, analysts have updated their forecasts, showing an increased optimism for Generac Holdings' future earnings potential and an upgraded price target.

feed.title: Rule 144 notice: Joy Liu reports VRTX share sales (VRTX)
feed.summary: A Rule 144 notice has been filed for Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) regarding proposed common stock sales by affiliate Joy Liu. The filing indicates a restricted stock vesting of 1,104 shares on February 24, 2025, and reports four sales by Liu between February 12, 2026, and April 1, 2026, including a large transaction of 9,320 shares. This notice provides transparency on insider equity transactions.

feed.title: Air Products Technology Solutions for Sustainable Iron and Steel Production at AISTech2026 | News Release
feed.summary: Air Products will showcase its industrial gas solutions for sustainable iron and steel production at AISTech2026. The company will feature its technology solutions, including oxy-fuel, hydrogen, and carbon capture, at booth #1336 and will donate up to $15,000 to the AIST Foundation based on booth visits. Additionally, Air Products' Commercial Technology Manager, Dr. Anup Sane, will present on enhancing the value of direct reduced iron in electric steelmaking.

feed.title: Memphis-based International Paper posts split results as spinoff nears
feed.summary: International Paper (IP) reported its Q1 earnings as it prepares to spin off its EMEA operations into a separate business within the next 12 to 15 months. Despite the spinoff, IP will maintain its headquarters in Memphis. The article also mentions related financial news concerning the company, including executive compensation and plant investments.

feed.title: Eaton Stock Just Hit a New High. The May 5 Earnings Test Is Bigger Than Usual
feed.summary: Eaton shares experienced a late-April rally, hitting a new intraday high before losing some ground ahead of its Q1 earnings report on May 5. Investors are focused on strong data-center demand, driven by AI, which is expected to boost orders, backlog, and margins for Eaton and its peers. The crucial earnings report will confirm if this AI-driven demand is sustainable amidst capacity constraints and rising costs.

feed.title: [144] United Airlines Holdings, Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: United Airlines Holdings, Inc. has filed a Form 144 with the SEC, indicating a proposed sale of 7,000 shares of common stock with an aggregate market value of $631,330. The securities, acquired through restricted stock vesting on February 10, 2025, are to be sold on May 1, 2026, via Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC on NASDAQ. The filing has a neutral impact and sentiment.

feed.title: Akanda Corp. Delays 20-F Amid Strategic Shift
feed.summary: Akanda Corp. has delayed its 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F due to complexities arising from significant operational changes, including the liquidation of its UK cannabis business and the acquisition of a Mexican telecom asset. Despite higher operating expenses, the company saw revenues of $258,075 in 2025 from its new telecom assets and slightly narrowed its net loss. Akanda has committed to filing the report within the 15-day grace period.

feed.title: Apollo Sports Capital leads $225M investment in Pickleball Inc.
feed.summary: Apollo Sports Capital has announced a significant $225 million investment in Pickleball Inc. This move highlights the growing financial interest and expansion within the sport of pickleball. The investment aims to further develop and capitalize on the rapid ascent of pickleball's popularity.

feed.title: Driving Change at CSX: A Conversation with Doug Ryhorchuk
feed.summary: This article features an interview with Doug Ryhorchuk, Senior Vice President of Operations at CSX, where he discusses his 40-year career in railroading and his journey to CSX in 2024. He shares insights into his leadership style, the cultural transformation at CSX, and his vision for the company's future, highlighting major projects like the Howard Street Tunnel expansion and Blue Ridge Subdivision restoration. Ryhorchuk emphasizes the critical balance between technology and human expertise in driving continuous improvement and building a resilient team at CSX.

feed.title: Meijer Helps Bring Huntington Bank’s Ignite the Classroom to West Michigan, Supporting Local Educators with a Year-Long Development Opportunity
feed.summary: Meijer is partnering with Huntington Bank to bring the "Ignite the Classroom" initiative to West Michigan, providing a year-long professional development program for over 150 local educators. This program, which includes an immersion experience at the Ron Clark Academy, aims to enhance instructional techniques, increase student engagement, and strengthen future career pathways, with positive results seen in student test scores and attendance in previous iterations. The initiative is offered at no cost to participating educators, thanks to contributions from Huntington and support from partners like Meijer.

feed.title: Optex Systems Announces Lionel Liebman as Director of Optical Engineering
feed.summary: Optex Systems Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq:OPXS) has appointed Lionel Liebman as its new Director of Optical Engineering. Liebman brings over 30 years of experience in optical systems for both commercial and defense applications, holding four patents and having previously held senior roles at Raytheon and Lockheed Martin. This appointment is expected to bolster Optex Systems' technology development and growth within the defense market.

feed.title: Is J.B. Hunt Transport Services (JBHT) Pricing Too Optimistic After Its Strong 1 Year Run?
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (JBHT) has seen significant stock appreciation, gaining 91.9% over the last year. Simply Wall St's valuation model suggests the stock is currently around 9.8% overvalued based on a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis, valuing it at approximately $224.22 per share compared to its current price of $246. Furthermore, its P/E ratio of 37.34x is higher than Simply Wall St's proprietary Fair Ratio of 19.70x, indicating it might be overvalued relative to its fundamentals.

feed.title: Oppenheimer Asset Management Trims MSCI Inc (MSCI) Position as Stock Trades 14 Percent Below Analyst Consensus Target
feed.summary: Oppenheimer Asset Management reduced its stake in MSCI Inc. (MSCI) by 8.1% in Q1 2026, selling 3,000 shares but retaining a substantial $19.24 million position. This move suggests risk management rather than a negative view, as MSCI reported strong Q1 revenues, analyst upgrades, and has a "Strong Buy" consensus target indicating potential upside of 12-16%. The firm's resilient business model, expansion into private markets, and renewed ESG growth support its long-term investment case.

feed.title: Church & Dwight (CHD) Q1: Adj. EPS $0.95 vs $0.99 (miss); Revenue $1,469.3M vs $1,508.84M (miss) -- Still 8.7% Undervalued? GF Score 85/100
feed.summary: Church & Dwight (CHD) reported Q1 2026 adjusted EPS of $0.95 and revenue of $1.469 billion, both missing analyst estimates of $0.99 and $1.509 billion, respectively. Despite the misses, the company reiterated its full-year 2026 outlook, citing strong organic sales growth of 5.0% driven by volume. GuruFocus rates CHD as 8.7% undervalued with a Strong GF Score of 85/100, though recent insider selling warrants caution.

feed.title: Is Alliant Energy (LNT) 20.3% Overvalued After Q1 2026 EPS Beat?
feed.summary: Alliant Energy (LNT) reported a GAAP EPS of $0.87 for Q1 2026, exceeding the estimated $0.79, while revenue was not disclosed. The company reaffirmed its 2026 ongoing EPS guidance and highlighted a new ~370 MW data center agreement, bringing total contracted data center demand to ~3.4 GW. GuruFocus research indicates that LNT shares are currently trading approximately 20.3% above its GF Value, suggesting it is overvalued despite a strong GF Score of 81/100.

feed.title: Linde (LIN) Q1 2026: Adjusted EPS $4.33 vs $4.23 est (beat), Revenue $8.78B vs $8.89B est (miss) -- Overvalued by 8.5%?
feed.summary: Linde (LIN) reported Q1 2026 adjusted EPS of $4.33, beating estimates of $4.23, while revenue of $8.78 billion missed the $8.89 billion

feed.title: Alliant Energy Q1 Earnings Match Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
feed.summary: Alliant Energy (LNT) reported first-quarter 2026 operating earnings of 82 cents per share, matching the Zacks Consensus Estimate, although slightly down from the prior year. Revenues increased by 4.96% year-over-year to $1.18 billion, surpassing estimates. The company also provided its 2026 earnings guidance and long-term EPS growth outlook, along with capital expenditure plans.

feed.title: Fidelity files Form 144 notice for SLB (NASDAQ: SLB) share lots
feed.summary: Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC has filed a Form 144 notice disclosing proposed sales of SLB common stock. These sales are tied to various compensation events and option grants, including restricted stock vesting and ESPP purchases from 2022-2023, and options granted in 2019 and 2020 with a reference date of May 1, 2026. The filing details multiple share lots, totaling 53,379 shares with an aggregate market value of over $2.9 million.

feed.title: Arch Capital Group (ACGL) Valuation Check After Recent Short Term Share Price Swings
feed.summary: Arch Capital Group (ACGL) has experienced recent short-term share price fluctuations, with modest declines over the last seven days to three months, despite a 5.3% one-year return and stronger multi-year gains. The stock is currently trading at US$94.46, below its fair value of $109.84, suggesting it is undervalued by 14%. Analysts' consensus price target aligns with this fair value, but investors are cautioned to consider potential risks like catastrophe losses and pressure on specialty premiums.

feed.title: Freedom Broker upgrades Biogen stock rating on Apellis acquisition By Investing.com
feed.summary: Freedom Broker upgraded Biogen to Buy from Hold, raising its price target to $245 from $185, citing strong first-quarter 2026 results and the strategic acquisition of Apellis. The firm believes the Apellis deal will address revenue headwinds from Biogen's aging product portfolio and support near-term financial performance. Despite a reduction in Biogen's EPS guidance due to one-time charges, analysts forecast $14.64 EPS for fiscal 2026, and InvestingPro indicates the stock is undervalued.

feed.title: Exxon, Chevron Beat Profit Estimates on War-Driven Oil Rally
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil Corp. and Chevron Corp. exceeded first-quarter profit estimates due to higher oil and natural gas prices, despite production outages caused by the Iran war. Both companies acknowledged the ongoing uncertainty regarding the Strait of Hormuz closure and its impact on future outlook. While Exxon is repurchasing $20 billion in shares this year, Chevron's buybacks were slightly lower than the previous period, with the company opting for caution despite strong earnings.

feed.title: A booth visit at AISTech2026 could send $100 to the AIST Foundation
feed.summary: Air Products will feature its industrial gas and decarbonization solutions at AISTech2026 from May 4-7 in Pittsburgh, with a focus on sustainable iron and steel production. The Air Products Foundation will donate $100 for each registered booth visitor, up to $15,000, to the AIST Foundation. Dr. Anup Sane will also deliver a presentation on enhancing the value-in-use of Direct Reduced Iron in electric steelmaking.

feed.title: Tranche Update on C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc.'s Equity Buyback Plan announced on July 24, 2007.
feed.summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. repurchased 1,231,600 shares for $213.35 million between January 1, 2026, and March 31, 2026. This brings the total repurchased shares to 79,297,570, or 55.26% of the stock, for $6,188.87 million under the buyback plan announced in July 2007. The company's stock was down 1.61% during the reported period.

feed.title: Royal Bank Of Canada Cuts International Paper (NYSE:IP) Price Target to $45.00
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada has lowered its price target for International Paper (NYSE:IP) to $45.00 from $48.00, while maintaining an "outperform" rating, indicating a potential 44% upside, despite a mixed "Hold" consensus among analysts. The adjustment follows the company's Q1 earnings miss and reduced Q2 adjusted EBITDA guidance due to higher costs. International Paper has bolstered its liquidity by divesting Global Cellulose Fibers for $1.1 billion and has set medium-term targets for adjusted EBITDA and free cash flow.

feed.title: American Rebel Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: AREB) American Rebel Light Beer Goes Full Throttle with Branded NHRA Lineup at This Weekend's Southern Nationals in Georgia
feed.summary: American Rebel Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: AREB) is heavily promoting its American Rebel Light Beer at the NHRA Southern Nationals in Georgia, featuring it as a primary sponsor across Top Fuel, Funny Car, and Pro Stock Motorcycle with elite racers Leah Pruett, Matt Hagan, and John Hall. This high-impact brand activation aims to connect with NHRA's patriotic fanbase, accelerate consumer awareness, and expand distribution for the "America's Patriotic Beer." The event will be broadcast nationally on FS1, providing significant exposure for the brand.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines Increases Pay For Non-Union Employees, Days After “Modest” Corporate Layoffs
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines is increasing pay for non-union employees by 4%, marking the fifth consecutive pay rise and a significant investment in its personnel, despite global industry pressures and rising fuel prices. This decision comes shortly after unverified reports of "modest" corporate layoffs within the airline's ground-based teams. Delta CEO Ed Bastian emphasized that caring for its people is central to the airline's culture, leading to consistent investments in employee compensation and profit-sharing, which already included a $1.3 billion bonus this year.

feed.title: SLB Wins Two 2026 OTC Spotlight on New Technology Awards
feed.summary: SLB received two 2026 Offshore Technology Conference (OTC) Spotlight on New Technology Awards for breakthrough solutions that are helping reshape the offshore energy sector. The recognized technologies are the Retina™ at-bit imaging system, which provides high-resolution borehole images directly at the drill bit, and the FIV-III™ dual-trigger formation isolation valve, offering robust well control and enhanced operational performance. These awards honor innovations demonstrating uniqueness, proven success, commercial viability, and significant value to the offshore industry.

feed.title: OMC Maintained by Morgan Stanley -- Price Target Raised to $83.0
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley analyst Benjamin Swinburne has maintained an Equal-Weight rating for Omnicom Group (OMC) and raised its price target from $82.00 to $83.00. Despite a P/E ratio significantly higher than its historical median, GuruFocus rates OMC as 19.0% undervalued with a GF Value™ of $95.42 and a strong GF Score™ of 87/100, though insider activity shows more selling than buying. This indicates potential for investors but warrants caution due to the high P/E and insider selling.

feed.title: JKHY Set to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in the Cards for the Stock?
feed.summary: Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (JKHY) is set to report its fiscal Q3 2026 earnings on May 5, with anticipated sales growth of 5.2% and an EPS decrease of 5.3% year-over-year. The company's performance is expected to be positively influenced by growth in its services and support categories, particularly within its Core and Payments segments due to cloud migration, robust transaction solutions, and advanced platforms. However, increased expenses for medical benefits, cloud infrastructure, and commissions could impact profit margins, and Zacks' model does not conclusively predict an earnings beat.

feed.title: AutoNation (AN) Q1 2026: GAAP EPS $5.85 Beats $5.43 Est., Revenue $6.55B Misses $7.06B -- Overvalued by 4.8%? GF Score 85/100
feed.summary: AutoNation Inc. (AN) reported Q1 2026 GAAP EPS of $5.85, exceeding analyst estimates, but revenue of $6.55 billion missed expectations. The company saw strong performance in after-sales gross profit and customer financial services, which helped offset lower unit volumes in new and used vehicle sales. Despite a resilient quarter and significant share buybacks, GuruFocus's GF Value framework suggests the stock is currently modestly overvalued by 4.8%.

feed.title: ONEOK (WMB) affiliate files Form 144; 2,000 shares proposed sale, past sales listed
feed.summary: An affiliate of ONEOK (WMB) has filed a Form 144, indicating a proposed sale of 2,000 shares of Common Stock from a restricted stock vesting on February 23, 2025. The filing also detailed several past sales by Terrance L. Wilson, including 2,000 shares for $132,780 on February 2, 2026; 27,000 shares for $1,968,821.69 on February 24, 2026; 2,000 shares for $150,480 on March 2, 2026; and 2,000 shares for $143,500 on April 1, 2026. Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC is listed as the broker for the proposed sale.

feed.title: First Solar rises as Q1 earnings top consensus despite tariffs (FSLR:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: First Solar (FSLR) shares rose after the company reported strong Q1 earnings that surpassed analyst expectations. The company achieved record Q1 revenues of $1.04 billion and saw improved margins, which helped to mitigate the impact of tariffs. Net income for the quarter increased significantly to $347 million, or $3.22 per share.

feed.title: DoorDash now accepts SNAP benefits at Kroger stores
feed.summary: DoorDash has announced that it will now accept SNAP benefits for online grocery orders from nearly 2,700 Kroger Co. stores, including Mariano's, Fred Meyer, Ralphs, and Harris Teeter locations. This expansion allows SNAP recipients to order groceries for delivery, with delivery fees waived on first orders from Kroger stores for a limited time when paid with an EBT card. The company also recently expanded its grocery delivery partnerships with several regional retailers in the U.S. and Canada.

feed.title: Rollins (ROL) CEO makes share gift, still holds 393,047 shares
feed.summary: Rollins (ROL) CEO Jerry Gahlhoff Jr. reported a gift of 3,629 shares of common stock on April 29, 2026, for no consideration. Following this transaction, Gahlhoff Jr. directly holds 393,047 shares, which include both restricted and unrestricted stock, and indirectly holds 1,623 shares through a 401(k) Plan. This filing indicates no open-market buying or selling activity.

feed.title: BlackRock reports 5.2% stake in Advanced Energy (NASDAQ: AEIS)
feed.summary: BlackRock Portfolio Management LLC has reported a 5.2% stake in Advanced Energy Industries (NASDAQ: AEIS), holding 1,958,423 shares of common stock. This disclosure, made via an amended Schedule 13G/A, indicates that BlackRock's reporting business units possess sole voting power over 1,825,293 shares and sole dispositive power over all 1,958,423 shares. The filing signals a passive investment, with control over disposition decisions resting at the reporting-unit level within BlackRock.

feed.title: Utility demand lifts Arcosa (NYSE: ACA) Q1 2026 profit and backlog
feed.summary: Arcosa (NYSE: ACA) reported strong financial results for Q1 2026, with revenues reaching $571.7 million, a 4.4% increase year-over-year, and net income climbing to $37.8 million. This growth was primarily fueled by the Engineered Structures segment, particularly its utility structures business, which also saw a robust backlog of $557.6 million. The company strategically divested its barge business for approximately $450 million to focus on core growth platforms and reduce debt, while also engaging in share repurchases and dividend payouts.

feed.title: Vanguard (NASDAQ: SAFT) holds 760,299 Safety Insurance shares
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management reported beneficially owning 760,299 shares of Safety Insurance Group Inc. (SAFT) common stock, representing 5.19% of the class, as detailed in a Schedule 13G filing on April 30, 2026. This passive investment grants Vanguard sole voting power for 108,759 shares and sole dispositive power for all 760,299 shares. The filing assures that the shares were acquired in the ordinary course of business and not for controlling or influencing the issuer.

feed.title: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Reminds Investors that a Class Action Lawsuit Has Been Filed Against Alight, Inc. and Encourages Investors to Contact the Firm Before May 15th
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has filed a class action lawsuit against Alight, Inc. (NYSE:ALIT) alleging that the company made misleading statements regarding its growth potential and financial stability, leading to investor losses. Investors who purchased Alight common stock between November 12, 2024, and February 18, 2026, are encouraged to contact the firm before May 15, 2026, to discuss their legal rights and potentially serve as lead plaintiff. The lawsuit claims that Alight announced disappointing results and goodwill impairments while failing to disclose the true need for higher compensation expenses to meet management's projections.

feed.title: 10 Industrials Stocks With Whale Alerts In Today's Session
feed.summary: This article identifies 10 industrial stocks that showed significant "whale alerts" (unusual options activity) during today's trading session. These alerts, detected by Benzinga's options activity scanner, indicate large institutional trades that could signal future price movements. The article provides details on specific call and put options for companies like Sunrun, Alaska Air Group, GE, and others, including strike prices, expiration dates, and sentiment.

feed.title: Tesla reports Elon Musk compensation at $158 billion for 2025
feed.summary: Tesla reported Elon Musk's compensation for 2025 at $158 billion, but he did not realize this amount because performance targets were not met. Musk draws no salary from Tesla. The article also touches on related automotive news, including April U.S. auto sales declines and updates on tariffs and EV cancellations.

feed.title: SLB AlphaSight Launch And Africa Digital Push Reframe Growth Story
feed.summary: SLB (NYSE:SLB) has launched AlphaSight, a new logging while drilling service for real-time multi-depth reservoir mapping, and expanded its digital operations at the Africa Performance Live Center, which now supports over 100 digital projects and is moving into autonomous workflows and energy transition work. These initiatives strengthen SLB's technological growth narrative, aiming to enhance operational efficiency and support new services. Investors should monitor customer adoption and how these projects scale as SLB differentiates itself in a competitive industry.

feed.title: Rollins (ROL) executive chairman gifts 4,795 shares, retains over 600k
feed.summary: John F. Wilson, the Executive Chairman of Rollins Inc. (ROL), reported a gift of 4,795 shares of common stock, which was a non-consideration transaction and not an open-market sale. Following this gift, Wilson directly holds 601,505 common shares, including both restricted and unrestricted stock, along with 299 shares through a Dividend Reinvestment Plan. The transaction is classified as a bona fide gift and does not reflect a typical market trade.

feed.title: Diluted shares outstanding of Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. Shs Canadian Depositary Receipt Repr Shs Reg S – TSX:GS
feed.summary: This article presents information on the diluted shares outstanding for Goldman Sachs Group, Inc., specifically for its Canadian Depositary Receipts (TSX:GS). The content includes a brief overview of the company's financial metrics on TradingView, indicating that specific data for diluted shares outstanding is listed by period, value, and percentage change. It appears to be a financial data snippet rather than a detailed analytical article.

feed.title: Will Embedding Zero Trust at the SIM Level in IoT Change Zscaler's (ZS) Narrative?
feed.summary: IXT integrated Zscaler's Zero Trust Network Access into its global cellular platform for secure IoT connectivity, routing SIM-level traffic through Zscaler's Zero Trust Exchange. This collaboration extends Zscaler's capabilities into industrial IoT and operational technology environments, potentially supporting customer replacement of legacy VPNs and firewalls with cloud-delivered security. While this move is positive for Zscaler's "Zero Trust Everywhere" strategy, its main near-term impact depends on broader platform adoption and managing margin pressure from heavy investment.

feed.title: EQT Active Core Infrastructure, a fund managed by EQT AB (OM:EQT) completed the acquisition of Small Cells Solutions Business from Crown Castle Inc..
feed.summary: EQT Active Core Infrastructure has completed its acquisition of Crown Castle Inc.'s Small Cells Solutions Business for approximately $4.3 billion. Following this acquisition, Arium Networks was launched to focus on deploying small cells and in-building networks in the US. Crown Castle plans to use the proceeds to repurchase $1 billion in shares and reduce debt by over $7 billion.

feed.title: Analog Devices (NASDAQ: ADI) files Form 144 showing 10,000-share sale planned 05/01/2026
feed.summary: Analog Devices (NASDAQ: ADI) has filed a Form 144 indicating a proposed sale of 10,000 shares on May 1, 2026, linked to options granted in March 2020. The filing also reports three previous sales of 10,000 shares each on February 2, March 2, and April 1, 2026, with proceeds ranging from $3,069,200 to $3,500,000. These transactions involve Vincent T. Roche as the reporting person and Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC as the broker.

feed.title: Paramount Skydance Stock Pops After Double Upgrade. Why Morgan Stanley Analyst Says It’s the ’Riskiest’ Call.
feed.summary: Paramount Skydance stock (PSKY) saw a significant jump following a double upgrade from Morgan Stanley. Despite the year-to-date decline of 18% for Paramount Skydance, a Morgan Stanley analyst noted this to be the 'riskiest' call, indicating a potentially volatile but optimistic outlook.

feed.title: UBS AG (AMUB) prices capped 160% participation MSCI EAFE notes
feed.summary: UBS AG has priced capped leveraged buffered MSCI EAFE index-linked medium-term notes (AMUB) with a 160% upside participation rate and a 15% buffer level. The notes, with a face value of $1,000, are expected to have a term between 25 and 28 months. Investors face the risk of leveraged losses if the underlying MSCI EAFE index falls below the 85% buffer level, and returns are capped at an expected maximum settlement amount between $1,257.12 and $1,302.40 per note, meaning they will not benefit from index gains above a certain cap.
